title: Pod Mushrooms & the Concentrate
bodyText: From burned spore-pods: Felson's **torch-mushroom**, Eddy's **invisibility mushroom** (bonus action, ~3 uses). Judy's **blue-mushroom concentrate** (healing + waterbreathing + disease-resist combined): pauses sickness progression ~1 week/dose — Koviz's current lifeline. A **Luckstone** (+1 checks & saves) appeared in the S11 prep's travel tables — confirm whether it was actually found.
